{{Quote|You're new in town. What's your pleasure?|Lorek|<ref name="Seregar Turnabout">{{WEGCite|story=Seregar Turnabout|book=No Disintegrations (West End Games)}}</ref>}}
'''Lorek''' was the [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] bartender of the [[CrossWind Saloon]] in [[Storrd Township]] on [[Seregar]]. He was a hard-looking man with [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoos]] on both arms. He didn't keep up with the affairs of Storrd Township but he would watch and report any interesting things to his boss, [[Daralla Errine]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Seregar Turnabout|book=No Disintegrations (West End Games)}} {{1st}}
